brief: Tensions in the Middle East escalate as US and Iran trade strikes in the Strait of Hormuz, driving oil prices up. Meanwhile, tech news includes a GitHub AI agent vulnerability and a purported GPT-5.6 launch. Research papers explore AI-driven game world generation and prompt engineering.
news_summary: US and Iran exchange attacks in the Gulf, risking shipping and oil supply. Other news: Chinese floods, NATO missile project, and a GitHub AI security breach.
papers_summary: Papers present AlayaWorld for long-horizon video world generation, an agentic tutor for prompt engineering, and GeoXplain for weather model explanations.
